commit.subject: LU-19515 mgc: shift NID list to start with one used
commit.message:
LU-19515 mgc: shift NID list to start with one used

While MGC creates new connection from IR NIDs, it uses the one
having local representation as primary but later adds whole NID
list from the beginning overwritting correct value.

Instead NID list passed to that connection should be shifted
to start with primary one

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
